top3_zh: [阿尔伯塔省一家农机创业公司 Ursa Ag](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47865868) 以 1,479 分 / 501 条评论占据 HN 第一，卖的是零电子设备的半价拖拉机。[@stego-tech 的置顶评论](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47865868)（"一个正在成长且尚未被开发的市场……电动车正在摒弃那些向云端汇报的传感器和驾驶辅助系统"）将这次发布变成了一份宣言；"无技术加持、半价出售"现在已经是一个明确的消费品类，而不仅仅是 HN 的部落立场。

[@nrehiew 的"过度编辑"研究](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47866913)（321 分 / 182 条评论）是第一份一手来源的分类整理，记录了 AI 智能体修改代码超出提示范围的现象。结合今天同日发布的 [Zed 并行智能体](https://zed.dev/blog/parallel-agents)（193 分）和 [OpenAI Workspace Agents](https://openai.com/index/introducing-workspace-agents-in-chatgpt/)（119 分）来看——"智能体范围控制"和"智能体数量"这两个品类在同一天开张。

Google Trends 显示 **"opus 4.7" 飙升 +3,050%**，**"codeium" +350%**，同时出现了 [SpaceX 据报以 $60B 收购 Cursor](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47855293)（795 分 / 951 条评论）的消息——编程智能体的用户切换市场处于持续震荡中，每 48-72 小时就有新的迁移触发器落地。
top3_en: An [Alberta farm-equipment startup called Ursa Ag](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47865868) hit the #1 HN slot at 1,479 points / 501 comments by selling half-price tractors with zero electronics. [@stego-tech's top-thread comment](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47865868) ("a growing and untapped market... EVs eschewing the myriad of sensors and driver assists that talk back to the cloud") turns the launch into a manifesto; "no-tech at half price" is now an explicit consumer category, not a tribal HN posture.

[@nrehiew's "over-editing" research](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47866913) (321 points / 182 comments) is the first primary-source taxonomy of AI agents modifying code beyond their prompt's scope. Pair it with [Zed's Parallel Agents](https://zed.dev/blog/parallel-agents) (193 points) and [OpenAI's Workspace Agents](https://openai.com/index/introducing-workspace-agents-in-chatgpt/) (119 points) — both shipped today — and "agent scope control" opened as a category on the same day "agent count" did.

Google Trends shows **"opus 4.7" surged +3,050%** and **"codeium" +350%** in the 7-day window, alongside a [reported $60B SpaceX–Cursor acquisition](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47855293) (795 points / 951 comments) — the coding-agent switching market is in continuous churn, with a fresh migration trigger landing every 48-72 hours.
intro_zh: 今天早上所有人都在盯着下一个模型发布——方向搞错了。Hacker News 排名第一的故事，以 1,479 分高居榜首的，是一家名叫 [Ursa Ag 的阿尔伯塔省小创业公司](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47865868)，卖的是半价拖拉机，零电子设备、零订阅费、零遥测。往下两行，[@nrehiew 发表的 321 分研究](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47866913) 用实证数据记录了"过度编辑"现象——当今编程智能体修改代码的范围超出了提示词的实际要求。两个不同的产品品类，读者的情绪却如出一辙：市场刚刚从"更多功能"转向了"少碰我的东西"。
intro_en: Everyone is scanning for the next model release this morning — wrong scoreboard. The #1 story on Hacker News at 1,479 points is a tiny [Alberta startup called Ursa Ag](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47865868) selling half-price tractors with zero electronics, zero subscriptions, and zero telemetry. Two rows down, a [321-point research piece by @nrehiew](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47866913) empirically documents "over-editing" — today's coding agents modifying code beyond what the prompt asked for. Different product categories, same reader mood: the market just rotated from "more features" to "fewer things touching my stuff."
